message:
fix: run export hooks from project dir and resolve paths to absolute

When --repo-path is used, hooks now execute with their working directory
set to the project directory instead of the caller's cwd.  Both
BV_EXPORT_PATH and the resolved project dir are guaranteed absolute so
hooks behave consistently regardless of invocation context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
